# manuellerchner.de-deploy

Declarative homelab deploy repo for Raspberry Pi. Single source of truth: `apps.yaml`.

## Generated files — never edit by hand
- `Caddyfile` → generated by `scripts/gen_caddyfile.py`
- `README.md` → generated by `scripts/gen_readme.py`

Both are regenerated automatically on every `git commit` via `.githooks/pre-commit`.

## Adding or changing an app
1. Edit `apps.yaml` only
2. Run `python3 scripts/lint.py` to validate (duplicate ports/domains, missing fields)
3. Commit — pre-commit hook regenerates Caddyfile + README automatically

## Key scripts
| Script | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `deploy.py [app\|all]` | Pull, build, restart PM2 / reload Caddy |
| `scripts/bootstrap.py` | One-time Pi setup (groups, yq, symlink, git hooks) |
| `scripts/lint.py` | Validate apps.yaml |
| `scripts/gen_caddyfile.py` | Regenerate Caddyfile |
| `scripts/gen_readme.py` | Regenerate README.md |

## App types in apps.yaml
- `static`: Caddy serves the output dir directly — no PM2 process
- `service`: PM2 manages the process; Caddy reverse-proxies to `port`
  - Node apps: set `entry: app.js`
  - Non-Node (e.g., Java): set `start_cmd: java -jar build/libs/app.jar`

## Security note
Repo is public. No credentials or secrets are stored here. Internal Pi ports
are behind Caddy and not directly exposed. Pi-Controller (`pi.manuellerchner.de`)
should have its own auth if it contains sensitive functionality.

## First-time Pi setup
```bash
git clone https://github.com/ManuelLerchner/manuellerchner.de-deploy.git /srv/deploy
cd /srv/deploy && python3 scripts/bootstrap.py
newgrp deploy
python3 deploy.py all
pm2 delete Website && pm2 save   # old PM2 process, now Caddy serves it
```
